title: MitoRiboPy run_manifest.json
description: Schema for the run_manifest.json that mitoribopy all writes at the run root. Required fields are the publication-grade reproducibility minimum: package version, command, config + sample-sheet hashes, stage records, output index, runtime, platform, and warnings. Optional fields are advisory.

schema_version.description: Manifest layout version (semver). MAJOR bump for breaking layout changes; MINOR for additive fields.

mitoribopy_version.description: PEP 440 version of the mitoribopy package that produced this run.

git_commit.description: Current commit when the package was installed from a git checkout; null when unknown.

command.description: Full argv joined with spaces, prefixed by the subcommand name.

config_source.description: Path to the user-supplied YAML / TOML / JSON config; null when no file was used.

config_source_sha256.description: SHA256 of the user's config file as written. Used by --resume to detect drift.

config_canonical.description: Merged + auto-wired canonical config that actually drove the run.

sample_sheet.description: Path to the unified per-project sample sheet TSV, when set.

sample_sheet_sha256.description: SHA256 of the sample sheet. Used by --resume to detect drift.

reference_checksum.description: SHA256 of the reference FASTA (promoted from the rpf settings for backwards-compat lookup). May be a placeholder string in test fixtures.

stages.description: Per-stage status, runtime, and skip-reason record.

align.description: Verbatim copy of the align stage's run_settings.json (or null when align did not run).

rpf.description: Verbatim copy of the rpf stage's run_settings.json (or null when rpf did not run).

rnaseq.description: Verbatim copy of the rnaseq stage's run_settings.json (or null when rnaseq did not run).

tools.description: Flat {tool: version} map lifted from per-stage settings (cutadapt, bowtie2, samtools, umi_tools, ...).

output_schemas.description: {filename: schema_version} for every advertised output TSV. A downstream consumer can gate on a compatible major version.

warnings.description: Structured warnings collected during the run. Mirrored to warnings.tsv.

outputs.description: outputs_index rows enumerating every advertised TSV, plot, and sidecar.

runtime_seconds.description: Total wall-clock seconds for the orchestrator.

platform.description: platform.platform() string of the host that produced the run.

python_version.description: platform.python_version() string of the host that produced the run.

resource_plan.description: Mirror of resource_plan.json: orchestrator-level CPU / memory budget. Null when the sidecar was not produced.

status.description: One of: completed (stage ran to completion), skipped (--resume hit cached output, or --skip-* flag), not_configured (no section for the stage in the YAML), error (stage raised before completing).
